policy_commitment: Miami-Dade County will cut communitywide greenhouse gas emissions 50% by 2030 from 2019 levels, and achieve net zero by 2050.
source_quote:
this plan describes work taking place on multiple fronts to cut MiamiDade's greenhouse gas emissions 50 percent by 2030 from 2019 levels,  with  the  goal  of  achieving  net  zero  by  2050.

This pledge is mobilizing communities to swiftly enact measures to reduce GHG emissions 50% by 2030 compared to 2019 levels and then progress forward to achieve net zero by 2050.
has_legal_mandate: No (County commitment / pledge; not presented as a legally binding ordinance in the excerpt)
extraction_notes: Clear, numerical community target and repeated as the Strategy's core goal (quantifiable target). It is a stated County commitment (Race to Zero pledge) and frames the Strategy.
causal_mechanism: Human activity → ↓ GHG emissions / ↑ carbon sinks → ↓ atmospheric forcing
policy_instruments: Not specified in the text (mechanism is a target/pledge). Likely/typical mechanisms to meet the target could include: renewable energy deployment; electrification of transport and buildings; energy efficiency measures; fuel switching; carbon sequestration/offsets; and decarbonization of waste and industrial sectors.
classification_signals: "cut ... greenhouse gas emissions 50% by 2030"; "net zero by 2050"; "reduce GHG emissions 50% by 2030 compared to 2019 levels"; "pledge ... enact measures to reduce GHG emissions"
